ManagedAttribute.displayName: Read all alert data, configure alerts, and take actions on all alerts for your company's directory [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the app to read and manage all role-based access control (RBAC) alerts for your company's directory, without a signed-in user. This includes managing alert settings, initiating alert scans, dismissing alerts, remediating alert incidents, and reading alert statuses, alert definitions, alert configurations and incidents that lead to an alert.
Read all alert data, configure alerts, and take actions on all alerts for your company's directory [on] Microsoft Graph
